automationRules.title: Check-out Completed
automationRules.desc: E-prescribe medical scripts to pharmacy, push insurance claim file, send survey link.

automationRules.title: Missed Appointment Rule
automationRules.desc: If patient is 15 minutes late, flag as no-show and auto-schedule a follow-up link.

aiSuggestions.title: Preventive Care Outreach
